overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at dusk. The character navigates covered walkways, crosses intersections with futuristic traffic, and explores the cyberpunk urban environment with wet streets reflecting vibrant pink and cyan neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking in the same direction

entered.detail: large concrete and metal elevated highway structure overhead with red neon trim
curved architectural feature with glowing red neon lighting
illuminated corporate signage reading DATA INC in blue neon
modern glass facade building with reflective windows and teal interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure. Red neon arches and the blue DATA INC sign illuminate the scene, reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead as the camera moves steadily forward through the covered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: futuristic silver sedan drives through the intersection, ego pauses at the crosswalk
ego steps onto the yellow crosswalk and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for vehicles to pass, then crossing the street

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection
pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead into the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
large commercial building with illuminated TURBO signage in orange and blue neon
multi-level highway overpass with glowing cyan accent lights underneath

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open intersection with a prominent yellow crosswalk. The TURBO building rises on the right with bright neon signage. After waiting for a futuristic sedan to pass, the character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the wet asphalt street toward the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza at intersection with elevated walkways

events.description: ego turns to survey the intersection, looking up at the surrounding architecture

agents.ego_description: finishing crossing the street and pausing to look around the intersection at the architecture

notable_agents.action: purple sedan driving past the intersection in the background

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertisement screen on the left side of the street
tall modern tower visible through the gap in the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character stands in an open plaza area surrounded by towering cyberpunk architecture. The TURBO building now dominates the right side of the frame at close range. The camera pans to take in the elevated walkways overhead and the glass skyscraper visible through the urban canyon, with neon advertisements glowing in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with neon storefronts and public seating

events.description: cut to new location along a different covered sidewalk with distinct purple neon signage and cherry blossoms visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk approaching another intersection with moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: building front with glowing purple neon strip lighting and XCXD signage
row of public seating with integrated purple neon lighting underneath
illuminated automated vendor with glowing display screen
trees with pink and white blossoms visible in the distance against the gray sky
complex structure with multiple floors and yellow structural accents

segments.scene_description: After a brief cut, the scene shifts to a different covered sidewalk lined with concrete benches featuring purple neon underlighting. The character walks past a vending machine and toward a group of pedestrians, with cherry blossom trees visible in the distance. The environment maintains the cyberpunk aesthetic with wet pavement reflecting the vibrant neon lights from the storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor into a wide, neon-drenched city intersection and finally into an expansive open plaza. It begins with the character walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, where red neon arches and a blue DATA INC sign reflect off the rain-slicked pavement. As the character emerges from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a bustling intersection featuring a prominent yellow crosswalk and the brightly lit TURBO building. After a futuristic sedan passes, the camera follows the character across the wet asphalt before the environment expands into a towering plaza. The shot finally pans upward to reveal a canyon of glass skyscrapers and elevated walkways, with glowing neon advertisements dominating the distant skyline.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a neon-lit urban walkway that transitions from a secluded concrete corridor toward a more populated city square. It begins on a covered sidewalk where the camera glides past concrete benches glowing with purple underlighting and a solitary vending machine. As the character advances, the wet pavement reflects the vibrant pink and cyan hues of nearby storefronts, guiding the view forward. The scene then opens up to reveal a group of pedestrians and the soft silhouettes of cherry blossom trees in the distance, blending the industrial cyberpunk aesthetic with organic elements.
